overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the futuristic Night City downtown district on a sunny day. The character travels along sidewalks past orange traffic railings, under yellow pedestrian overpasses, and approaches a distinctive spherical building with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street with dedicated bike lane

events.description: begins walking along the sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane street with orange safety railings
white van drives past on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk next to orange traffic railings and a red bike lane

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk
pedestrian in purple jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: bright orange metal barriers separating the red bike lane from the vehicle road
dedicated bicycle lane painted red running parallel to the sidewalk
dark modern facades with large digital billboards displaying advertisements
elevated walkway with distinctive yellow structural beams crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a busy downtown sidewalk next to orange safety railings and a red bike lane. A white van drives past on the multi-lane road while a pedestrian in purple walks ahead. Tall commercial buildings with digital billboards line the street as the character approaches a yellow pedestrian overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: enters the covered area beneath the yellow pedestrian overpass
lighting shifts to dappled shadows as the character moves deeper under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the yellow overpass structure, passing between thick support columns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on the ground against the wall near a storefront

entered.detail: thick cylindrical pillars supporting the yellow walkway structure overhead
red neon signage for CIRKUS venue mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the yellow pedestrian overpass, moving through a semi-covered corridor with thick support columns. The lighting becomes shadowed and mixed. A red neon CIRKUS sign is visible on the right wall, and a pedestrian sits against the storefront while vehicles pass by on the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined downtown boulevard with corporate buildings

events.description: exits the covered overpass into bright open sunlight
passes large tree planters casting dappled shadows across the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk past large potted trees and futuristic street furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking ahead in the distance toward the skyscrapers

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planters containing mature trees providing shade
teal neon corporate signage for BRISTON on the dark building facade
tall poles with distinctive horizontal orange light bars

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the character enters a bright sunlit boulevard lined with large tree planters on the right. The BRISTON corporate sign glows teal on the building facade. Futuristic street lights with orange bars line the left side of the street as the character walks toward the distant glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district approaching spherical landmark building

events.description: approaches the distinctive spherical building structure with holographic displays
futuristic flying vehicle hovers near the spherical building overhead

agents.ego_description: approaching a busy intersection area with a distinctive spherical building and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying vehicle hovering and maneuvering near the spherical building structure
group of pedestrians gathered near the building entrance and sitting on planters

entered.detail: large rounded metallic building with circular form and external holographic displays
teal neon signage for WILLIAM PIERCE APARTMENTS on the right building
floating three-dimensional digital billboards and rotating advertisements in the air

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major commercial intersection dominated by a large spherical building with holographic advertisements floating around it. The WILLIAM PIERCE APARTMENTS sign is visible on the right. A flying vehicle hovers near the spherical structure while groups of pedestrians gather near the entrance. The scene is bright with strong sunlight casting sharp shadows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling downtown district that transitions from a crowded sidewalk into a grand, sun-drenched commercial plaza. It begins along a busy street lined with orange safety railings and digital billboards, moving past a white van and a pedestrian in purple toward a yellow overpass. As the character passes beneath the overpass, the scene shifts into a shadowed corridor marked by a red neon CIRKUS sign and thick support columns. The environment then opens back into a bright, sunlit boulevard featuring teal corporate signage and futuristic street lights before turning toward a major intersection. Finally, the camera approaches a massive spherical building surrounded by floating holographic advertisements and hovering vehicles under a clear, brilliant sky.
